'''鈭歳-zh-th''' ('''razhatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucharistize|eucharistize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucharistize|eucharistize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-zh-th
|-
! Lemma
| razhatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:razhathithi|razhathithi]] || [[word:razhathiji|razhathiji]] || [[word:razhathishi|razhathishi]] || [[word:razhathi|razhathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:razhathuthuth|razhathuthuth]] || [[word:razhathujuj|razhathujuj]] || [[word:razhathushush|razhathushush]] || [[word:razhath|razhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:razhathuthu|razhathuthu]] || [[word:razhathuju|razhathuju]] || [[word:razhathushu|razhathushu]] || [[word:razhathu|razhathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:razhathufuth|razhathufuth]] || [[word:razhathufuj|razhathufuj]] || [[word:razhathufush|razhathufush]] || [[word:razhathuf|razhathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:razhathethe|razhathethe]] || [[word:razhatheje|razhatheje]] || [[word:razhatheshe|razhatheshe]] || [[word:razhathe|razhathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:razhathothoth|razhathothoth]] || [[word:razhathojoj|razhathojoj]] || [[word:razhathoshosh|razhathoshosh]] || [[word:razhath|razhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:razhathotho|razhathotho]] || [[word:razhathojo|razhathojo]] || [[word:razhathosho|razhathosho]] || [[word:razhatho|razhatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:razhathofoth|razhathofoth]] || [[word:razhathofoj|razhathofoj]] || [[word:razhathofosh|razhathofosh]] || [[word:razhathof|razhathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:razhath忙th忙|razhath忙th忙]] || [[word:razhath忙j忙|razhath忙j忙]] || [[word:razhath忙sh忙|razhath忙sh忙]] || [[word:razhath忙|razhath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:razhathathath|razhathathath]] || [[word:razhathajaj|razhathajaj]] || [[word:razhathashash|razhathashash]] || [[word:razhath|razhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:razhathatha|razhathatha]] || [[word:razhathaja|razhathaja]] || [[word:razhathasha|razhathasha]] || [[word:razhatha|razhatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:razhathafath|razhathafath]] || [[word:razhathafaj|razhathafaj]] || [[word:razhathafash|razhathafash]] || [[word:razhathaf|razhathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:razhathasha|razhathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorazhathasha|gorazhathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirazhathasha|gokirazhathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:razhathn眉sha|razhathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorazhathnkn眉sha|gorazhathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirazhathn眉sha|gokirazhathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:razhathsh毛sha|razhathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorazhathnksh毛sha|gorazhathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirazhathsh毛sha|gokirazhathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:razhathrosha|razhathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorazhathnkrosha|gorazhathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirazhathrosha|gokirazhathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:razhathmusha|razhathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazhathnkmusha|gorazhathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazhathmusha|gokirazhathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:razhathsherasha|razhathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorazhathnksherasha|gorazhathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirazhathsherasha|gokirazhathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:razhathngasha|razhathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorazhathnkngasha|gorazhathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirazhathngasha|gokirazhathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:razhathyasha|razhathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorazhathnkyasha|gorazhathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirazhathyasha|gokirazhathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:razhathyamasha|razhathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorazhathnkyamasha|gorazhathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirazhathyamasha|gokirazhathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:razhathn眉sh毛sha|razhathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorazhathnkn眉sh毛sha|gorazhathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirazhathn眉sh毛sha|gokirazhathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:razhathn眉rosha|razhathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorazhathnkn眉rosha|gorazhathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirazhathn眉rosha|gokirazhathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razhathn眉musha|razhathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazhathnkn眉musha|gorazhathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazhathn眉musha|gokirazhathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:razhathsh毛n眉sha|razhathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorazhathnksh毛n眉sha|gorazhathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirazhathsh毛n眉sha|gokirazhathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:razhathsh毛rosha|razhathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorazhathnksh毛rosha|gorazhathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirazhathsh毛rosha|gokirazhathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razhathsh毛musha|razhathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazhathnksh毛musha|gorazhathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazhathsh毛musha|gokirazhathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:razhathron眉sha|razhathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorazhathnkron眉sha|gorazhathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirazhathron眉sha|gokirazhathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:razhathrosh毛sha|razhathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorazhathnkrosh毛sha|gorazhathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirazhathrosh毛sha|gokirazhathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razhathromusha|razhathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazhathnkromusha|gorazhathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazhathromusha|gokirazhathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:razhathmun眉sha|razhathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorazhathnkmun眉sha|gorazhathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirazhathmun眉sha|gokirazhathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:razhathmush毛sha|razhathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorazhathnkmush毛sha|gorazhathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirazhathmush毛sha|gokirazhathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:razhathmurosha|razhathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorazhathnkmurosha|gorazhathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirazhathmurosha|gokirazhathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:razhath|razhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:r忙zh忙th|r忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horazhath|horazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hor忙zh忙th|hor忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorazhath|hohorazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohor忙zh忙th|hohor忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉razhath|n眉razhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉r忙zh忙th|n眉r忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉razhath|n眉n眉razhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉r忙zh忙th|n眉n眉r忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂razhath|n茂razhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂r忙zh忙th|n茂r忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂razhath|n茂n茂razhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂r忙zh忙th|n茂n茂r忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurazhath|lurazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lur忙zh忙th|lur忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurazhath|lulurazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulur忙zh忙th|lulur忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirazhath|lirazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lir忙zh忙th|lir忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirazhath|lilirazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilir忙zh忙th|lilir忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korazhath|korazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kor忙zh忙th|kor忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorazhath|kokorazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokor忙zh忙th|kokor忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerazhath|kerazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ker忙zh忙th|ker忙zh忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerazhath|kekerazhath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keker忙zh忙th|keker忙zh忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
